parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SDP Initiated Request/Response\nPattern with Correlation ID

box "SDP"
participant "SERVER\nNODE 1" as SN1 #Orange
participant "SERVER\nNODE 2" as SN2 #Orange
participant "STATE\nCACHE" as SC #Orange
participant "BROKER" as B #Orange
end box

box "TBM/HU"
participant "APP" as APP #Orange
end box

SN1 -> SN1 : new request/response\ninteraction
activate SN1 #DodgerBlue
SN1 -> SN1 : create interaction\ncontext
SN1 -> SC : newMessageID =\nnextMessageID()
SN1 -> SC : put(newMessageID,\ninteraction context)
SN1 -> SN1 : create message
SN1 -> SN1 : message.messageID =\nnewMessageID
SN1 -> B : publish message
deactivate SN1

B -> APP : read message
activate APP #LightSteelBlue
APP -> APP : create response
APP -> APP : response.correlationID =\nmessage.messageID
APP -> B : publish response
deactivate APP

B -> SN2 : read response
activate SN2 #DodgerBlue
SN2 -> SC : interaction context =\nget(response.correlationID)
SN2 -> SN2 : process response
SN2 -> SC : delete(response.correlationID)
deactivate SN2

@enduml
```
